top_signals.title: Commission proposes to extend temporary protection of people fleeing Ukraine for an additional year
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 26 Jun 2026 Today, the Commission is proposing to extend for an additional year the temporary protection for people fleeing Russia's war of aggression against Ukraine, while taking into account Ukraine's overall ability to defend itself. By doing so, the Commission reinforces its unwavering commitment to support Ukraine for as long as it takes.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Transcript of the Governor's pooled broadcast interview given on 18 June 2026
top_signals.summary: Following the publication of the Monetary Policy Summary and minutes of the Monetary Policy Committee meeting

top_signals.title: Central reservations − speech by Alan Taylor
top_signals.summary: Given at the Barclays-CEPR Monetary Policy Forum, London

top_signals.title: Spain regulator rules out extension for non-MiCA compliant crypto companies
top_signals.summary: Carlos San Basilio said that “there will be no exceptions ​or extensions” to the MiCA deadline requiring crypto exchanges offering services to EU-based users to be licensed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: CISA sets urgent deadline to fix Cisco flaw exploited in attacks
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) is giving federal agencies until Sunday to patch a vulnerability in Cisco Unified Communications Manager Server that is being actively exploited. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
